CS.name: Computer Science
CS.notes: Plus one of MAT1020 or MAT1021 (Calculus). Total 128 credits for BS, 128 for BA (with language through 2002 level).

BIO.name: Biology
BIO.notes: Select five upper-division bio electives (three must include labs). Physics I and II required as gen-ed natural science. Total 129 credits.

CHE.name: Chemistry
CHE.notes: ACS-Accredited track. Select 3 elective courses (12 credits). Total 128 credits.

BIOCHEM.name: Biochemistry and Molecular Biology
BIOCHEM.notes: Select 3-5 elective courses (12-20 credits). Research Seminar I or II required. Total 128 credits.

HSC.name: Health Science
HSC.notes: Select 2 from 2000-3000 level HSC electives, 1 from 4000-level HSC capstone, and 1 from Psychology/Human Services list. Chemistry: CHE1003 or CHE1020. Statistics: MAT1014, PSY3012, HUS3012, or SOC3006. Total 128 credits.

ACC.name: Accounting
ACC.notes: Select 1 BES elective (4 cr). Total 128 credits.

FIN.name: Finance
FIN.notes: Select 1 from ECO3010/ECO3013 (Money & Banking or Digital Economy) as required Finance elective. Select 1 BES elective. Total 128 credits.

CRJ.name: Criminal Justice
CRJ.notes: Three tracks: Law Enforcement, Legal Studies, and Crime Scene Investigation. Select track-specific courses. Total 128 credits.

ANT.name: Anthropology
ANT.notes: Select 1 from ANT2008/ANT3021. Select 2 from SOC/ANT electives. Total 128 credits.

courses.notes: Stats prereq can be MAT1014, PSY3012, HUS3012, or SOC3006
